channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: India's former prime minister Manmohan Singh, architect of economic reforms, dies aged 92
item.description: NEW DELHI (AP) — India’s former Prime Minister Manmohan Singh, widely regarded as the architect of India’s economic reform program and a landmark nuclear deal with the United States, has died. He was 92.
item.dc:creator: AIJAZ HUSSAIN and ASHOK SHARMA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Christmas shooting at Phoenix airport leaves 3 people wounded, 1 stabbed
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Authorities are investigating a Christmas shooting at Sky Harbor Airport in Phoenix that left three people injured by gunfire and another person stabbed. Police said the incident was related to a family dispute. Phoenix police said the evening shooting happened at around 9:45 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Russia cautions against 'hypotheses' in Azerbaijan Airlines crash
item.description: Kremlin spokesperson Dmitry Peskov told reporters that it was "necessary to wait for the end of this probe" before casting any speculation.
item.dc:creator: Brad Dress, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Officers in LA County use infrared tech to rescue missing man
item.description: A 78-year-old California man with dementia who had gone missing on a chilly December day was located thanks to infrared heat-seeking technology.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, NewsNation

item.title: Body found in wheel well of United Airlines plane
item.description: HONOLULU (KHON2) -- It was an unsettling and tragic discovery on Christmas Eve when the body of a dead man was discovered inside the wheel well of a United Airlines flight from Chicago after landing on Maui.
item.dc:creator: Emily Cervantes, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Drone sightings drop, but answers from feds remain limited
item.description: Federal and local investigators report a decrease in drone sightings while the FBI says there is nothing new to report
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NYC Grand Central Christmas slashing suspect cries out to mother during court appearance
item.description: The suspect accused of slashings inside New York City's Grand Central subway station reportedly cried out upon seeing his mother in court.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ukraine's military intelligence says North Korean troops are suffering heavy battlefield losses
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — North Korean troops are suffering heavy losses in the fighting in Russia's Kursk region and facing logistical difficulties as a result of Ukrainian attacks, Ukraine’s military intelligence said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: SAMYA KULLAB, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Year-end travel: What you need to know about post-holiday trips
item.description: CHICAGO (NewsNation) — Millions of Americans are traveling on Thursday as a record-breaking post-holiday rush continues. The Transportation Security Administration anticipates Friday to be one of the season's busiest days, with 40 million passengers projected to be screened on New Year's Day.
item.dc:creator: Nick Smith, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Peyote sacred to Native Americans threatened by psychedelic renaissance and development
item.description: Peyote, a cactus that contains mescaline, a hallucinogen, grows naturally in South Texas and northern Mexico.
item.dc:creator: Deepa Bharath And Jessie Wardarski, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump has pressed for voting changes. GOP majorities in Congress will try to make that happen
item.description: Republicans in Congress plan to move quickly in their effort to overhaul the nation’s voting procedures, seeing an opportunity with control of the White House and both chambers of Congress.
item.dc:creator: Christina A. Cassidy, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Beyoncé's performance highlighted Netflix's NFL debut on Christmas Day
item.description: Beyoncé provided more excitement than either game during Netflix’s NFL debut on Christmas Day. Riding into her halftime appearance on a white horse, the 32-time Grammy winner rocked her hometown Houston crowd with a nearly 13-minute performance on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Pope calls for nations to overcome divisions in Christmas address as communities celebrate worldwide
item.description: VATICAN CITY (AP) — Pope Francis in his traditional Christmas message on Wednesday urged “all people of all nations” to find courage during this Holy Year “to silence the sounds of arms and overcome divisions” plaguing the world, from the Middle East to Ukraine, Africa to Asia.
item.dc:creator: SILVIA STELLACCI and COLLEEN BARRY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bill Bergey, a Pro Bowl linebacker for the Eagles, dies at 79
item.description: Bill Bergey, a five-time Pro Bowl linebacker who played in a Super Bowl for the Philadelphia Eagles, died Wednesday, the team announced. He was 79.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Blake Lively's claims that movie co-star launched smear campaign gets support in publicist's suit
item.description: Blake Lively's claims that “It Ends With Us” director and co-star Justin Baldoni unleashed a smear campaign against her have gained support from a new lawsuit that Baldoni's former publicist filed against him.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Snowy owl rescued from car grille by Minnesota woman who saved another bird hours earlier
item.description: Annabell Whelan woke up Tuesday and frantically checked on her holiday overnight guest — Nowl the snowy owl, who she rescued from the grille of a car the day before.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH FINGERHUT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trial of man accused in Florida Trump assassination attempt pushed back to September
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — A man accused of attempting to assassinate President-elect Donald Trump in South Florida won't be tried until September 2025, a federal judge ruled this week. Ryan Routh's trial will begin Sept. 8 instead of the previously scheduled Feb. 10, 2025 start date, U.S.
item.dc:creator: MIKE SCHNEIDER, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Jackpot for Mega Millions over $1 billion after no numbers match on Christmas Eve drawing
item.description: Hang onto those stocking-stuffer lottery tickets. The Mega Millions jackpot has surpassed $1 billion after no ticket matched all six numbers drawn on Christmas Eve. That means the estimated jackpot for Friday's drawing is $1.15 billion, potentially the fifth-largest jackpot in the game's history.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Azerbaijani airliner with 67 people onboard crashes in Kazakhstan leaving 32 survivors
item.description: An Azerbaijani airliner with 67 people onboard crashed Wednesday near the Kazakhstani city of Aktau, leaving at least 32 survivors, according to officials. More than 30 people may be dead.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Homeland Security launches internal AI chatbot for 19,000 staff
item.description: The tool, called DHSChat, will be available to approximately 19,000 employees at DHS headquarters and select pilot users across ten operating agencies.
item.dc:creator: Damita Menezes, NewsNation

item.title: Medical examiner says a Hawaii crime boss died of a drug overdose while in federal detention
item.description: HONOLULU (AP) — A Hawaii crime boss who died in federal detention this month was killed by an opioid overdose, Honolulu’s medical examiner said Tuesday. Michael Miske, 50, died of “toxicity of fentanyl and para-fluorofentanyl,” the medical examiner’s office said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: AUDREY McAVOY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Report: Significantly fewer migrants on ICE's Alternatives to Detention in South Texas
item.description: The number of asylum-seekers monitored without detention by U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement has dropped significantly this past year in the Rio Grande Valley of South Texas, according to new data.
item.dc:creator: Sandra Sanchez, Fox 5

item.title: Biden signs a bill officially making the bald eagle the national bird of the US
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The bald eagle, a symbol of the power and strength of the United States for more than 240 years, earned an overdue honor on Tuesday: It officially became the country's national bird.
item.dc:creator: DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Eye drops recalled nationwide due to fungal contamination
item.description: Check your medicine cabinets: A brand of eye drops sold nationally has been recalled due to the presence of fungus, which may cause vision damage.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Self, KRON4

item.title: Walmart illegally opened bank accounts for 1 million drivers, lawsuit alleges
item.description: Walmart and fintech company Branch Messenger are being sued by the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau for allegedly forcing more than one million delivery workers to use expensive deposit accounts to access their paychecks.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, Fox 5

item.title: Bill Clinton is hospitalized with a fever but in good spirits, spokesperson says
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Former President Bill Clinton was admitted Monday to MedStar Georgetown University Hospital in Washington after developing a fever. The 78-year-old was hospitalized in the “afternoon for testing and observation," Angel Urena, Clinton's deputy chief of staff, said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Relief, defiance, anger: Families and advocates react to Biden's death row commutations
item.description: COLUMBIA, South Carolina (AP) — Victims' families and others affected by crimes that resulted in federal death row convictions shared a range of emotions on Monday, from relief to anger, after President Joe Biden commuted dozens of the sentences.
item.dc:creator: JEFFREY COLLINS and ALI SWENSON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Luigi Mangione's lawyer blasts New York officials for 'staged' perp walk
item.description: The attorney for Luigi Mangione, who has been accused of killing UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson, slammed New York City officials for what she referred to as a “staged” perp walk for her client last week.
item.dc:creator: Jared Gans, ABC 4

item.title: Houston Astros welcome 1B Christian Walker to team; say negotiations with Bregman stalled
item.description: The Astros welcomed first baseman Christian Walker to the team Monday, in one of two moves that almost certainly marks the end of Alex Bregman’s time in Houston.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Congress looks to ban Chinese drones widely used in US: What to know about the debate
item.description: Lawmakers in Washington are seeking to ban new sales of drones from two dominant Chinese manufacturers, arguing they could be used to spy on Americans and that the low-cost models are hurting the U.S. drone industry.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump wants mass deportations. A ride-along with immigration officers shows the challenges
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The immigration officers sat in their vehicles before dawn near a two-story building. A New York subway line rumbled overhead, then an officer's voice crackled over the radio. After watching for about two hours, he said, “I think that's Tango,” using a term for target. “Gray hoodie.
item.dc:creator: REBECCA SANTANA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Biden didn't remove these 3 inmates from death row
item.description: Those who received the Monday commutations of their sentences saw them go from execution to life with no possibility of parole. However, three “hard cases” were not among the commutations.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: READ: House Ethics report on Gaetz allegations
item.description: The House Ethics Committee on Monday released its report on former Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.), who has faced allegations of sexual misconduct and illicit drug use, among other violations.
item.dc:creator: The Hill Staff, Fox 5

item.title: Biden gives life in prison to 37 of 40 federal death row inmates
item.description: The move spares the lives of people convicted in killings, including the slayings of police and military officers, people on federal land and those involved in deadly bank robberies or drug deals, as well as the killings of guards or prisoners in federal facilities.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Former Israeli spies describe attack using exploding electronic devices against Hezbollah
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Two recently retired senior Israeli intelligence agents shared new details about a deadly clandestine operation years in the making that targeted Hezbollah militants in Lebanon and Syria using exploding pagers and walkie talkies three months ago.
item.dc:creator: DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: House passes bill to avert government shutdown after whirlwind funding fight
item.description: The House approved legislation to avert a government shutdown hours before the deadline Friday, sending the bill to the Senate for consideration after a whirlwind week on Capitol Hill.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, WGN 9
